name: Hot Air
author: Poki
description: Ride the wind in Hot Air! In this physics-based puzzle game made by Nitrome, you play as a little balloon that has to make its way through all the levels! Using his a little propeller, you can create airstreams to move the balloon around. Be careful however, if you touch a wall or an enemy, the balloon will pop! There's 20 different levels to play and 5 bonus stages to beat - can you fly through them all? How to play Hot Air? Use the mouse to create airstreams and move the balloon! Who created Hot Air? Hot Air is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Hot Air for free? You can play Hot Air for free on Poki. Can I play Hot Air on mobile devices and desktop? Hot Air can be played on your computer only.
